events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Let's hear it for the icon! Cyndi Lauper turns 73. What's your favourite track from the 'Queen of Quirky Pop'?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter George Michael, who rose to fame with Wham! before a hugely successful solo career, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday.

angles.name: A True Icon
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move us.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away at the age of 50 in Los Angeles.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's influence on music, dance, and culture remains unparalleled. What's your ultimate MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Keep spreading that peace and love, Ringo!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic lead guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! From stadium rock to astrophysics, what an icon.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the incredible Sir Mick Jagger.

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape with its 24/7 music video programming, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when music television was just that? 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed everything. What was the first music video you ever saw?

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring anthems like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Imagine being there!

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the world lost a true legend. Elvis Presley's music and legacy live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Legendary Flow
angles.copy: Three decades on, Tupac Shakur's impact on music and culture is still felt. Remembering a true legend today.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, leaving an indelible mark on music history.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969, featuring tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure genius. What's your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The fierce and influential lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still fronting The Pretenders with unparalleled style.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and Beady Eye, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: As You Were
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: 51 years of John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1975, a song that continues to resonate globally.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A powerful message of peace that still echoes today.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music and putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the first time you saw an iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple launched a device that changed music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to celebrate 007 with some classic theme tunes. What's your favourite Bond film or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The visionary co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering A Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible life and legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
